data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Easy cancellation of single occurrence', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific functionality. While the linked use case mentions the ability to cancel a single occurrence, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm this behavior has been implemented or validated. Therefore, the validation step reveals a gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the requirement for easy cancellation of a single occurrence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add cancellation endpoint validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a booking can be canceled easily through the API.
